profile.name: Peiyu Liu / 刘沛羽
profile.title: Assistant Professor
profile.affiliation: School of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University of International Business and Economics

bioParagraphs: I am currently an Assistant Professor at the School of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, University of International Business and Economics.

I received my PhD in Artificial Intelligence from the Gaoling School of Artificial Intelligence, Renmin University of China, advised by Prof. Wayne Xin Zhao. I also hold an MS in Software Engineering from the School of Information, advised by Prof. Wei Xu.
My research interests primarily focus on natural language processing, model compression, and efficient LLM systems.

chineseBio.prefix: 刘沛羽，对外经济贸易大学人工智能与数据科学学院助理教授。于2024年在中国人民大学高瓴人工智能学院获人工智能博士学位，导师为
chineseBio.suffix: 。研究兴趣围绕自然语言处理与模型压缩展开，近期重点关注大语言模型高效推理、长上下文推理、智能体数据分析、代码生成等方向。近年来在ACL、EMNLP、COLING、ICML、NeurIPS等自然语言处理与机器学习领域国际会议上发表多篇论文，曾获ACL 2023 Best Paper提名。

recruiting.title: 招生与合作
recruiting.text: 欢迎对高效大语言模型、模型压缩、长上下文推理、智能体数据分析和代码生成等方向感兴趣的同学联系我。如果你有自己的想法，并希望一起做有意义、有影响力的研究，欢迎通过邮件交流。

teaching.title: Teaching AI through systems, history, and practice
teaching.description: I teach data structures, algorithm design, AI literacy, and frontier topics in large language models, with an emphasis on automatic evaluation, project-based learning, and AI-empowered research practice.

directions.name: Parameters
directions.subtitle: Parameter expansion, compression, and parameter-efficient adaptation
directions.desc: This line studies how to make model parameters more flexible and efficient: expanding capacity, compressing parameters, and adapting models with lightweight trainable components.

directions.name: Runtime
directions.subtitle: KV cache compression, long-context memory, and inference acceleration
directions.desc: This line focuses on runtime efficiency after the model is deployed, especially KV cache memory, long-context reasoning, and fast retrieval-augmented video or multimodal inference.

directions.name: Agent
directions.subtitle: Data synthesis, Text-to-SQL agents, and dynamic workflow learning
directions.desc: This line studies how LLMs can become better problem solvers through synthesized reasoning data, schema linking, and learned workflows for complex data analysis.

directions.name: Open Source Project
directions.subtitle: Squrve: a modular framework for complex real-world Text-to-SQL tasks
directions.desc: This line presents Squrve as the open-source project layer of the Text-to-SQL research line, integrating modular components, workflow construction, evaluation, and deployment-oriented support for complex real-world data analysis tasks.

news.text: Selected as an ICML 2026 Silver Reviewer.
Three papers accepted by ACL 2026: one Main paper, one Findings paper, and one Demo paper.
Two papers accepted by ICML 2026, covering dynamic Text-to-SQL workflows and KV cache optimization.
